input: Run reporting templates on this project
expected_behavior: Skill activates and produces the expected reporting templates output following the defined process
Skill recognizes the trigger phrase and executes the reporting templates workflow

input: Apply reporting templates to analyze the current codebase with detailed output
expected_behavior: Skill produces comprehensive reporting templates analysis with evidence-tagged findings
